name: test_copy_message_to_clipboard
description:
TC-CHAT-008: Copy message to clipboard.

        Sends a message first, then verifies the copy button works and
        the copied content matches the actual message text.
descriptionHtml:
TC-CHAT-008: Copy message to clipboard.

    Sends a message first, then verifies the copy button works and
    the copied content matches the actual message text.
statusMessage:
AssertionError: Clipboard content does not match message text (after markdown normalization).
  Clipboard (normalized): I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message that you've shared for me to copy. 
  
  Could you p...
  Expected: I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message that you've shared for me to copy. 
  Could you pl...
assert "I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message that you've shared for me to copy. \n\nCould you please provide the message or content you'd like me to work with? Once you share it, I can help you with:\n\nCopying/reproducing the message\nFormatting it in a specific way\nModifying it as needed\nSaving it to a file\nOr any other task you have in mind\n\nPlease share the message you'd like me to copy!" == "I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message that you've shared for me to copy. \nCould you please provide the message or content you'd like me to work with? Once you share it, I can help you with:\nCopying/reproducing the message\nFormatting it in a specific way\nModifying it as needed\nSaving it to a file\nOr any other task you have in mind\nPlease share the message you'd like me to copy!"
  
    I'm ready to help! However, I don't see any message that you've shared for me to copy. 
  + 
    Could you please provide the message or content you'd like me to work with? Once you share it, I can help you with:
  + 
    Copying/reproducing the message
    Formatting it in a specific way
    Modifying it as needed
    Saving it to a file
    Or any other task you have in mind
  + 
    Please share the message you'd like me to copy!
statusTrace:
